title: cyclosorus extensus
intro: Cyclosorus extensus, also known as the extended leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus extensus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the leaves, which can be consumed as tea, capsules, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
